# @pondoknusa/broadcasting

Real-time event broadcasting for Pondoknusa

## Install

```bash
npm install @pondoknusa/broadcasting
```

## Metadata

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Version | `2.0.0` |
| Source | [`packages/broadcasting`](https://github.com/pondoknusa/pondoknusa/tree/main/packages/broadcasting) |
| Category | Platform services |
| Node.js | `>=26` |
